research_question: In adults aged 18 years and older undergoing cataract surgery, what is the effect of blue-light filtering intraocular lenses compared to non-blue-light filtering intraocular lenses on distance best-corrected visual acuity, age-related macular degeneration progression, contrast sensitivity, color discrimination, and other functional outcomes?
